\title{Global Author-Block Grouping in a Two-Column World}
\author{
\IEEEauthorblockN{Alice Anderson, Carol Chen}
\IEEEauthorblockA{Department of Electrical Engineering, University A, City A, Country A\\alice.anderson@university-a.edu}

\begin{abstract}
We demonstrate globally grouped IEEE author blocks across non-consecutive authors sharing an affiliation.
\end{abstract}
\begin{IEEEkeywords}
author blocks, IEEEtran
